instructions: For each entry below, the SEN TECH team or designer should: (1) browse Unsplash, (2) pick a photo matching the 'searchHint', (3) paste the source URL + photographer info, (4) download to this directory with the listed filename. All Unsplash photos are CC0 / Unsplash License — free for commercial use without attribution required, but we record attribution for transparency.

items.searchHint: industrial cleanroom electronics manufacturing, no people, neutral lighting, wide composition
macro shot small electronic component on neutral background
car dashboard or EV battery management close-up, modern, clean
modern kitchen appliance close-up, refrigerator interior or oven control panel
laboratory measurement equipment, oscilloscope or precision instrument, neutral
